Write the following text formally and academically: "Hi. I hope you are doing well. If you want to have a class this weekend, we can have one class on Thursday from 10 to 11. If you are not comfortable with this week, we can have a class on Sunday from 10 to 11. Also, please let me know how many sessions would you like to come per week."

Dear [Recipient],

I trust this message finds you in good health and high spirits. I would like to discuss the possibility of scheduling a class this weekend. 

If you find it suitable, I propose arranging one class on Thursday from 10 to 11. However, should this not meet your convenience, I suggest holding a session on Sunday during the same time. 

Moreover, it would be greatly appreciated if you could kindly inform me as to how many sessions you would wish to attend per week, as this would enable us to arrange a schedule that caters to your availability and learning goals.

Thank you for your time and attention in this matter. 

Best regards, [Your name]
